meta.title: mybetrecord - Tracker sharadka ciyaaraha, ROI & Kelly Stake Ledger
meta.description: Lasoco sharad kasta hal buug oo edbin ah. ROI, wax-soo-saarka, saamiga Kelly, CLV, qalooca sinnaanta, iyo dhoofinta - loo dhisay dadka sharad ku gala tiro.
meta.pricingDescription: Ledge sharadka ciyaaraha ee bilaashka ah oo leh astaamo buuxa, ama Pro-gaynta aan xadidnayn ee maalinlaha ah ee ku saabsan $5 USD bishii lacagta deegaankaaga.

home.heroTitle: Tracker sharadka ciyaaraha ee dadka sharad ku galay lambar
home.heroLead: Jooji juglayn xaashida. Geli wager kasta, lasoco ROI oo wax-soosaar, cabirka saamiga Kelly, oo arag meesha cidhifkaagu runtii ku nool yahay.
home.section1Title: Laga soo bilaabo fowdada xaashida ilaa buug-tilmaameed leh
home.section1Sub: Bettors badankoodu way ka koraan qoraalada apps iyo tabaha Excel. mybetrecord waxay ku siinaysaa hal meel oo aad ku duubto sharadyada, xalliso natiijooyinka, oo aad akhrido lambarada waxqabadka daacadda ah.
home.featureOddsDesc: Qaabab tobanle, Ameerikaan, jajab ah, iyo qaabab Aasiyaan — si toos ah loo caadiyeeyay si ay warbixinadu u ahaato mid joogto ah.
home.featureKellyDesc: Deji xisaabinta bangiga iyo geesaha; hel cabbirada saamiga lagu taliyey ee ku salaysan shuruudaha Kelly.
home.featureRoiDesc: Heerka shaqo-joojinta, ka-wareejinta, faa'iidada bishiiba, iyo isugeynta sinnaanta qalooca ee sharadka la dejiyay.
home.featureBreakdownsDesc: U jar waxqabadka isboortiga, nooca sharad, tilmaan-bixiyaha, ama buug-sameeyaha si aad u hesho meesha aad ku guulaysato oo aad daadiso.
home.featureClvDesc: Diiwaangeli fursadaha xidhitaanka oo cabbir CLV - calaamad ka fiiqan natiijooyinka wakhtiga gaaban oo keliya.
home.featureExportDesc: Soo deji CSV, Excel, ama JSON. U samee furayaasha API ee qoraallada iyo otomaatiga
home.pricingSub: Muuqaal kasta oo hoose wuxuu ku jiraa labada qorshe. Pro waxa uu meesha ka saarayaa furka wax-qorista ee maalinlaha ah - ilaa $5 USD bishii lacagta deegaankaaga.
home.pricingProLimit: sharadka aan xadidnayn iyo kuwa badan maalin kasta
home.pricingFeatureLedger: Buuxda khamaarka - dhacdooyinka, xulashada, saamiga, natiijooyinka & P/L
home.pricingFeatureOdds: Dhammaan qaababka kala duwan - jajab tobanle, Ameerikaan, jajab iyo Aasiyaan
home.pricingFeatureTypes: Nooc kasta oo sharad ah - guulaysta, dhinac kasta, ka hooseeya, badan iyo curyaan
home.pricingFeatureKelly: Kelly ayaa ka cabiraysa bangigaaga & geesta la sheegay
home.pricingFeatureReports: ROI, wax-soo-saarka, heerka shaqo joojinta & qalooca sinnaanta isugeynta
home.pricingFeatureBreakdowns: Burburinta isboortiga, nooca sharadka, tilmaanta & buug-sameeyaha
home.pricingFeatureEdge: Qaabka & khiyaamooyinka shakhsi ahaaneed ee leh cidhif-cutub kasta
home.pricingFeatureSettlement: Lacagta caddaanka ah ee la soo saaray & wax-ka-jarida guuleystayaasha
home.pricingFeatureLocale: Interface-ka luuqadaha badan iyo taageerada aagga waqtiga
home.pricingNote: Pro waa qiyaastii $5 USD bishii, oo lagu muujiyay lacagta deegaankaaga. Ka noqo wakhti kasta Settings
home.section2Sub: Baro xisaabta gadaasha cabbirada - ka dibna ku raadi buuggaaga.
home.blogRoiDesc: Laba lambar oo cinwaan ah, oo inta badan jahawareersan. Ogow midka ka jawaabaya su'aasha.
home.blogKellyDesc: Sida ugu wanaagsan ee cabirka saamiga u shaqeeyo - iyo sababta inta badan khamaarayaasha ay u isticmaalaan qayb ka mid ah Kelly buuxda.
home.blogSpreadsheetDesc: Marka Excel ku filan yahay - iyo marka buug-gacmeedka go'an uu badbaadiyo saacadaha iyo khaladaadka.
home.faqTrackerA: Leyger habaysan ee wager kasta - saamiyo, khayaali, natiijooyin, iyo faa'iido - oo leh ROI otomaatig ah, wax-soo-saarka, iyo burburka halkii ay ka ahaan lahaayeen qaacidooyinka xaashida buug-gacmeedka.
home.faqOddsQ: Waa kuwee qaababka khiyaaliga ah ee la taageeray?
home.faqOddsA: jajab tobanle, Maraykan, jajab, Hong Kong, Malaysian, iyo Indonesian. Dhammaan khamaaradaha waxaa lagu kaydiyaa jaantusyada tobanle ee canonical si looga warbixiyo.
home.faqKellyQ: Sidee Kelly saamiga halkan uga shaqeeyaa?
home.faqKellyA: Geli khiyaamada shakhsi ahaaneed ee sharadka. Iyada oo la adeegsanayo bangiyada iyo Kelly multiplier lagu dejiyay goobaha, appku wuxuu ku talinayaa saami ku salaysan cidhifkaaga la sheegay.
home.faqExportQ: Ma dhoofin karaa ama ma isticmaali karaa API?
home.faqExportA: Haa — CSV, Excel, iyo JSON Dhoofinta iyo furayaasha API ee gelitaanka barnaamijka ee diiwaankaaga.
home.faqTipsterA: Maya. mybetrecord waa kaydinta iyo falanqaynta kaliya. Ma iibino wax la soo doorto mana ballanqaadno faa'iido.
home.rg: Khamaarka mas'uulka ah. Sharadka waa inuu noqdaa madadaalo, ee maaha dakhli. Weligaa ha gelin wax ka badan intaad awoodid inaad lumiso. Haddii khamaarku uu noloshaada saamaynayo, caawimaad ka raadso ururada sida BeGambleAware ama daaweynta khamaarka. mybetrecord ma fududayso inaad sharad gasho - waxay kaa caawinaysaa inaad fahanto taariikhdaada.
home.ctaTitle: Diyaar ma u tahay inaad sharad ku gasho nambar?
home.ctaLead: Abuur akoon bilaasha oo gal sharadkaaga ugu horeeya hal daqiiqo gudaheed.
home.footerCopy: © mybetrecord. Falanqaynta iyo kaydinta - maaha talada khamaarka.

meta.title: Blog - mybetrecord
meta.description: Tilmaamaha buugaagta sharadka, ROI, shuruudaha Kelly, qiimaha xidhitaanka, iyo falanqaynta sharadka ciyaaraha.

blog.indexSub: Baro xisaabta gadaasha cabbirada - ka dibna ku raadi buuggaaga.
blog.ctaLead: Gal sharadyada, arag ROI iyo wax-soo-saarka, iyo saamiga cabbirka ee Kelly - akoon bilaash ah.
blog.rg: Khamaarka mas'uulka ah.Waxay ka kooban tahay waxbarasho kaliya - maaha talo sharadka. Weligaa ha gelin wax ka badan intaad awoodid inaad lumiso.

spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.title: Xaashiyaha faafinta vs Tracker sharadka u go'ay
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.description: Marka Excel uu ku filnaado rikoorka sharadka - iyo marka raadraaca u go'an uu badbaadiyo waqti, khaladaad, iyo dhibco indho la'aan.
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.body:
Xaashiyaha faafintu waa barta caalamiga ah ee laga bilaabo diiwaannada sharadka. Waa xor, dabacsanaan, oo la yaqaan. Bettors badan ayaa waligood ka tagin iyaga. Kuwo kale waxay ku dhufteen gidaar - badanaa marka kakanaanta ay ka baxdo unugyada iyo qaababka.

Marka xaashidu shaqaynayso

  • In ka yar ~50 sharad bishii
  • Sports hal, lacag keli ah, jajab tobanle oo keliya
  • Natiijooyinka guul-darrada/guul-darrada fudud, ma jiro waddo kasta ama guddi beddelasho
  • Waxaad ku raaxaysataa ilaalinta qaacidooyinka

Halkay xaashida xaashida jaban

Dhibaatada xanuunka xaashida faafinta faa'iidada raadiyaha Qaabka qallafsan Tiirarka beddelka gacanta Isku-beddel toos ah Wado kasta / EW Qaabka kala qaybinta u nugul khaladka Dejin ku dhex-dhismay Kelly cabbirka Dib u dhis marka uu bankigu is beddelo Talo bixin toos ah halkii sharad CLV Tiirar dheeraad ah, fududahay in la boodo Goob kasta oo sharad ah Burburinta Dayactirka miiska pivot Hal-guji isboorti/tipster API / automation Qoraallada jilicsan furayaasha API-fasalka koowaad Galitaanka mobilada Clunky Barnaamijka shabakadda ee ka jawaaba

Qiimaha qarsoon: wakhtiga

Toban daqiiqo wiiggii hagaajinta qaacidooyinka iyo koobiyaynta khaladaadka ayaa ka badan qiimaha aaladda loo qoondeeyay qof kasta oo si dhab ah u sharadka. Kharashka weyni waago'aannada xunxun ee laga helo xogta xun- waa faaruq loo diiwaan galiyay khasaare, guddi la iloobay.

Jidka socdaalka

  1. Dhoofinta wax kasta oo aad haysato (CSV way fiicantahay)
  2. Soo deji ama dib-u-fure sharadka xilli-ciyaareedkii dhawaa
  3. Is barbar socda laba toddobaad - wadarta guud waa inay iswaafaqaan
  4. Ka fariiso xaashida faafinta marka warbixinadu isku raacaan

Waa maxay raad-raacuhu aanu samayn

Waa inaysan iibin wax-soo-doorasho, ballan-qaad ROI, ama aysan beddelin anshaxa bangiyada. mybetrecord waa taxliilin iyo kaydin - xaashida faafinta si lama filaan ah uma jabin kartid.

Labadaba isku day si daacad ah

Hayso xaashidaada hal bil oo dheeraad ah laakiin geli sharadyada cusub mybetrecord. Is barbar dhig faa'iidada bisha dhamaadka-dhammaadka iyo wax-soo-saarka. Haddii ay iswaafaqaan oo raadraacahu uu kaydiyay wakhti, beddel.

Bilaash ku bilow: Same akoon — looma baahna kaar si aad u bilowdo.

betting-equity-curve.title: Akhrinta Qalooca Sinaanta sharadka
betting-equity-curve.description: Qalooca sinnaanta ayaa qorsheeya faa'iido isugeyn ah muddo ka dib. Baro micnaha qaababka, sababta khamaarka la sugayo looga saaray, iyo sida loo ogaado qulqulka.
betting-equity-curve.body:
Anequity curvewaa jaantus toosan oo faa'iido wadareed (ama banki) kadib sharad kasta oo la dejiyo, sida ay u kala horeeyaan. Waxay u rogtaa shaxda natiijooyinka sheeko aad akhrin karto marka aad eegto.

Sidee u eg qalooca caafimaadka qaba

Cirifka togan ee leh faaqidaad macquul ah waxay soo saartaa socod sare oo hoos u dhac leh - maaha xariiq toosan. Xilliyada gaaban ee fidsan ama hoos u dhaca waa kala duwanaansho caadi ah; Socodka joogtada ah ee adiga kugu lidka ah waxa laga yaabaa in ay tilmaamto qaabka qudhunka ama edbinta.

qaababka qalooca caadiga ah

Jiirar gacmeed, hoos u dhac yar.

Sabooyin isbedbeddelaya - faylalka dhaadheer ee culus. Lulida waaweyn; ROI keligiis ayaa marin habaabiyaa iyada oo aan wax saami ah la gelin.

Dhismaha dhagaxa ah - badiyaa saamiyadu way korodhaa ka dib markii ay si isdaba joog ah u socdeen (dhaqan aan ahayn Kelly) ama istaraatiijiyad ay beddesho muunada dhexe.

Qiyaasta la sugayo Mushqaayad aan deganayn waa inaysan ka muuqan qalooca sinnaanta - wali ma ogaan P/L. Iyaga oo ay ku jiraan waxay buufisaa ama u jajabisaa khadka si khiyaali ah.

Bankroll vs faa'iidada qalooca

Jaantusyada qaarkood waxay qorsheeyaan bilaabida bangiga dhexe + faa'iidada isugeynta; kuwa kale waxay maleegayaan faa'iidada kaliya. Ku toosi jaantuska sida aad maskax ahaan u maamusho lacagta. Mybetrecord's sinnaanta qalooca waxay isticmaashaa faa'iido la dajiyay waqti ka dib; Bangiyada ku jira tickerka waxa ku jira bangigaaga bilawga ah ee habaysan iyo P/L oo la xaqiiqsaday

Isticmaalka qalooca si ogaanshaha

  1. Calaamad ku calaamadee istiraatijiyada isbeddelka waqtiga (ciyaaraha cusub, talo-bixiye cusub)
  2. Is barbar dhig jiirada qalooca ka hor/kadib beddelka
  3. Celceliska saamiga dulsaarka - ma kala duwanaanshiyaha saamiga ayaa la wadaa mise gees-ka-qaadis?

Ku xidh halbeegyada kale

Curyaaminta sinnaanta ayaa ku been abuurta haddii aad iska indho tirto CLV, wax-soo-saarka, iyo cabbirka muunadda. U isticmaal qalooca dareenka; miisaska u isticmaal go'aannada.

Ka eeg qaloocaada sinnaanta ee warbixinnada mybetrecord ka dib markaad gasho sharadyo dhawr ah.

each-way-bet-settlement.title: Qaab Kasta Oo La Sharaxay
each-way-bet-settlement.description: Sida khamaar kastaa u bixiyo qaybta guusha iyo meelaynta. Tusaalooyin la shaqeeyay oo leh jajabyada goobta iyo xeerarka kulaylka dhintay.
each-way-bet-settlement.body:
Qadka mid kastaku waa laba sharad oo mid ah: kala badh saamiga xulashada si aad u guulaysato, badhna waa in la dhigo (ku dhammayn boosaska shuruudaha buug). Xisaabta dejinta waxay kor u qaadaa xaashiyo badan.

Qaabka

Isugaynta saamiga S way kala baxdaa:

  • Guulay qayb: S/2 marka la isku daro guusha
  • Qaybta goobta: S/2 meesha u qalmida

Qaybta meesha = 1 + (guulaysiga - 1) × Jajabka booska

Jajabka booska caadiga ah: 1/4ama 1/5 ee fursadaha guusha.

Tusaale - guulaysta

£20 dhinac walba (£10 guul + £10 meel) marka 10.00 guul ah, 1/4 shuruudaha booska.

  • Qayb guuleed ayaa bixisa: 10 × £10 = £100 soo celin (£90 faa'iido)
  • Qaybta goobta: 1 + (10 - 1) × 0.25 = 3.25 → 3.25 × £10 = £32.50 soo celinta (£22.50 faa'iido)
    • Wadarta faa'iidada= £90 + £22.50 = £112.50

Tusaale - la dhigay kaliya

Shar isku mid ah, farasku wuxuu ku dhammeeyaa kaalinta labaad (meelaha la bixiyo, guul la'aan):

  • Qayb guulaysta ayaa khasaara: -£10
  • Qaybta goobta ayaa badisay: £22.50 faa'iido sida kor ku xusan
  • faa'iido saafi ah= £12.50

Tusaale - aan meel la dhigin

Labada qayboodba way lumiyaan: -£20( saami dhan ).

Sarifka iyo kiisaska gaarka ah

Sarriflayaashu inta badan waxay kala soocaan guusha iyo meelaynta suuqyada - ma aha tigidh keliya oo jid kasta ah. Kulaylka dhintay wuxuu yareeyaa soo celinta goobta. Xeerka 4 ka jaris ayaa lagu dabaqaa qaybaha guusha tartanka.

Had iyo jeer ku duubEach_way= runiyo place_fraction ku jira buug-gacmeedkaaga si software-ku u dabaqo isla qaacido wakhti kasta.

La soco dhinac kasta mybetrecord

U beddelo jid kasta markaad soo gasho sharad, deji jajabka booska, oo dejintu ha xisaabiso faa'iidada marka aad calaamadiso natiijooyinka guulaysta/ guuldarada/meelaynta.

odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.title: Foomamka Khasaaraha - jajab tobanle, Ameerikaan, iyo jajab
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.description: U beddelo jajab tobanle, Maraykan iyo jajab. Shaxda tixraaca iyo qaacidooyinka Hong Kong, Malaysian, iyo qaababka Indonesian
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.body:
Buug-sameeyayaasha adduunka oo dhan ayaa si kala duwan u soo bandhiga qiimayaasha. Buug-gacmeedka edbinta leh wuxuu kaydiyaa haljajab tobanlegudaha isagoo kuu ogolaanaya inaad geliso khamaarka qaab kasta oo aad shaashadda ku aragto.

Jajab tobanle (Yurub)

Isugaynta wadarta saamiga unug kasta oo ay ku jirto saamiga. Decimal 2.50 → ku guulaysto £1.50 faa'iido £1 saamiga ah.

Faa'iido= saamiga × ( jajab tobanle - 1 )

Mareykan (khadka lacagta)

Togan (+150): faa'iidada laga helayo £100 saamiga ah. +150 → jajab tobanle 2.50.

Negative (-200): saamiga loo baahan yahay si loogu guuleysto £100. -200 → jajab tobanle 1.50.

Beddelka:

  • Haddii Ameerikaan > 0: jajab tobanle = 1 + American/100
  • Haddii Ameerikaan < 0: jajab tobanle = 1 + 100/|Mareykan|

Jajab (UK)

6/4 macnaheedu waa ku guuleysiga £6 £4 kasta oo saami ah jajab tobanle = 1 + nambareeyaha/denominator = 2.50.

Goobaha qaar ayaa muujinaya “6/4” sida qaybta guusha oo kaliya; had iyo jeer xaqiiji in saamiga lagu soo daray bandhigga.

Qaababka Aasiya

Qaabka Tusaale Jadbale Hong Kong 0.85 1.85 Malayshiyaan + 0.85 1.85 Malaysiyaan − -0.85 1 + 1/0.85 ≈ 2.176 Indonesiiyaan + 1.50 2.50 Indonesiiyaan − -1.50 1 + 1/1.50 ≈ 1.667

Waa maxay sababta caadiyeyntu muhiim u tahay

Isku dhafka qaababka hal xaashiyaha ayaa sababa khaladaad aamusan - calamadaha laga jaro Maraykanka, kala qaybsanaanta jajabka, ama loola dhaqmo HK sida jajab tobanle. Software-ku waa inuu beddelaa gelinta oo aanu waligii lumin saxnaanta.

Tallaabo wax ku ool ah

Deji qaabka gelitaanka asalka ah tracker kaaga oo ku habboon buug-sameeyahaaga aasaasiga ah, laakiin xaqiiji jajab tobanle oo u dhigma kaydinta ilaa ay caadadu ku dheggan tahay.

mybetrecord waxay aqbashaa dhammaan qaababka liiska waxayna ku kaydisaa jajab tobanle warbixin kasta iyo xisaabinta Kelly.

closing-line-value-clv.title: Qiimaha Khadka Xidhitaanka (CLV) - Waa maxay sababta Sharp Bettors ay ula socdaan
closing-line-value-clv.description: Qiimaha xariiqda xidhitaanka ayaa cabbiraya inaad garaacday qiimaha suuqa ugu dambeeya. Baro sida loo xisaabiyo CLV iyo sababta ay u saadaaliso xirfadda mustaqbalka fog.
closing-line-value-clv.body:
Closing line value (CLV)wuxuu isbarbar dhigayaa jaanisyada aad qaadatay marka loo eego jaanisyada la heli karo marka suuqu xidhmo (sida caadiga ah laad ama tartanka). Ku garaacista si joogto ah waa mid ka mid ah saadaalinta ugu xooggan ee faa'iidada muddada-dheer - waxay ka xoog badan tahay bisha nasiibka leh ee P/L.

Waa maxay sababta khadka xidhidhku muhiim u yahay

isugaynta xogta suuqyada Qiimaha xidhitaanka ayaa ka tarjumaysa qiyaasta ugu fiiqan ee la heli karo ka hor dhacdada. Haddii aad si joogto ah u hesho 2.10 marka xidhidhku yahay 2.00, waxaad helaysaa qiime ka hor inta aanu suuqu saxin.

Xisaabinta CLV

Qeexitaan guud:

CLV % = ( jajab tobanlahaaga jajab tobanle ÷ xidhitaanka jajab tobanle - 1) × 100%

Tusaale: waxaad sharad gashay 2.20, ku dhawaad 2.00.

CLV = (2.20 ÷ 2.00 - 1) × 100 = +10%

CLV-da xun waxay la macno tahay inaad qaadatay wax ka xun kii dhow - xitaa sharadka guulaysta wuxuu noqon karaa nidaamka sharadka.

CLV vs natiijooyin

Kala duwanaanshuhu wuxuu qariyaa xirfadda shaybaarada yaryar. Waxaad ku waayi kartaa lacag leh CLV togan toddobaadyo, ama waxaad ku guuleysan kartaa CLV taban kulayliyaha. Raad raac CLV boqolaal sharad si aad u xukunto habka.

Maxaa la duubayaa

Qiyaas kasta, kaydi:

  • Khilaafkaaga (qaab kasta)
  • Xilliyada xidhitaanka (isku suuq, doorasho isku mid ah)
  • Timestamp-ka haddi xariiqdu dhaqaaqdo maalinta gudaheeda

Xidhyada sarrifka ayaa ka duwan xidhitaannada buugaagta jilicsan - ku joog si joogto ah xogtaada.

Xakamaynta

  • Xadhiga xidhiddu maaha runta dhulka - dhaqaaqa uumiga sidoo kale wuu khaldami karaa
  • Qiyaasaha xayeysiinta iyo waxay kordhisaa isbarbardhigga qalloocan
  • Suuqyada yaryar waxay leeyihiin xidhitaan buuq badan

U isticmaal CLV gudaha mybetrecord

Ku dar jaanisyada xidhitaanka ee gelitaanka sharad ama wax ka beddel. Warbixinadu waxay dusha ka saari karaan celceliska CLV oo ay weheliyaan ROI si aad u kala saartaan nasiibka iyo cidhifka.

kelly-criterion-explained.title: Kelly Criterion ayaa loo sharaxay Bettors
kelly-criterion-explained.description: Heerarka Kelly waxay cabbirtaa saamiga laga soo bilaabo geesaha iyo khayaaliga. Baro qaacidada, Kelly jajabka, iyo tusaalaha tirada oo aad xaqiijin karto.
kelly-criterion-explained.body:
Cilmiga Kellyayaa ka jawaabaya hal su'aal: marka la eego cirifkaaga la qiyaasay, waa maxay qaybta bangiga ee ay tahay in aad qayb ka qaadato si aad u kordhiso kobaca muddada dheer - adiga oo aan khatar gelinin halligaad xun?

Qaciidada (khasaaraha tobanlaha)

Qiimaha jajab tobanlaha O oo ku guulaysto itimaalka p:

Kelly jajab = (O × p - 1) / (O - 1)

Stake = Kelly fraction × bankroll (badanaa lagu dhufto qodob badbaado)

Tusaale tiro

Waxaad aaminsantahay in kooxdu ay haysato 55% fursad ay ku guulaysato 2.00 (xitaa lacag).

  • p = 0.55, O = 2.0
  • Kelly = (2.0 × 0.55 - 1) / (2.0 - 1) = 0.10 / 1.0 = 10% ee bangiga bangiga
£1,000 bangi, Kelly buuxda waxay soo jeedinaysaa £100. Bettors intooda badan waxay isticmaalaanhaf Kelly(5%, £50) ama Qarter Kellysi loo yareeyo kala duwanaanshiyaha.

Edge ka yimid khiyaamo maldahan

Haddii aad “caddaalad” qiimuhu waa jajab tobanle 1.91 (52.4%) waxaadna helaysaa 2.00 (50%), waxaad leedahay gees togan. Kelly waxay u beddeshaa cidhifkaas oo lagu daray jaanisyada loo soo bandhigay cabbirka saamiga.

Maxay mar walba Kelly u buuxin weyday?

Kelli buuxa waxa ay kordhisaa kobaca joomatari ee aragtida. Dhaqan ahaan:

  • Qiyaastaada p waa khalad in ka badan inta aad u malaynayso
  • Shamacado isku mar ah ayaa isku xidhan (isku mid ah horyaal, isla maalin)
  • Dhibaatooyinka nafsiga ah waxay sababaan ka tagista nidaamka

Jajab Kelly (0.25-0.5×) waa heer ka dhex jira sharadka xirfadlayaasha ah.

khaladaadka caadiga ah

  • Isticmaalka Kelly marka aanad lahayn qiyaas dhab ah oo cidhiidhi ah
  • Codsiga Kelly ee ku saabsan ereyada la xidhiidha sida dhacdooyin madax-bannaan
  • Iigoo iska indhatiraya bankiyada aan run ahaantii ahayn & ldquo;Rsk Capital”

Kula soco Kelly gudaha mybetrecord

Deji bankiga iyo tirada badan ee Kelly ee goobaha. Geli khariidada shakhsi ahaaneed ee sharad kasta si aad u aragto saamiga lagu taliyey ee weheliyo saamigaaga dhabta ah - hubin fayoobi, ma aha amar.

roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.title: ROI vs Wax-soosaarka sharadista Ciyaaraha
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.description: ROI iyo wax-soo-saarku waxay cabbiraan waxqabadka sharadka si kala duwan. Baro qaaciidooyinka, tusaalooyinka la shaqeeyay, iyo goorta la isticmaalayo mitir kasta.
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.body:
ROI(soo-noqoshada maalgashiga) iyo wax-soo-saarkawaa labada lambar ee cinwaannada ugu waaweyn ee sharadka khiyaanada ah. Way isku xidhan yihiin laakiin maaha kuwo la isweydaarsado - adeegsiga khaladku wuxuu ka dhigi karaa nasasho-xittaa bisha mid u eg masiibo, ama lidkeeda.

Qeexitaannada

ROI= wadarta faa'iidada ÷ wadarta saamiyada × 100%

wax-soo-saarka= wadarta faa'iidada ÷ wadarta guud ee wax-soo-celinta × 100%

Qadka saamile fidsan ee aan waligiis kordhin cabbirka, soo wareejintu waxay la mid tahay saamiga iyo tirooyinka iswaafaqsan. Marka saamiyadu kala duwanaadaan - cabbirka Kelly, isku-darka, ama cutubyada isku dhafan - way kala duwan yihiin.

Tusaale la shaqeeyay

Ka soo qaad in ka badan 10 sharad oo la dejiyay in aad dulsaartay £100 mar kasta (£1,000 wadarta saamiyada) oo aad faa'iido gaadhey £50.

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%
  • Soosaar = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%
Hadda ka soo qaad in hal sharad uu ahaa £500 inta soo hartayna £50 (£950 wadarta saamiyada), isla £50 faa'iido:

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 950 × 100 ≈ 5.3%
  • Wax-soo-saarka ayaa weli tixraacaya beddelka si la mid ah haddii beddelka = saamiyo
Jahwareerka ayaa inta badan soo baxa marka ay dadku isku daraanROI bangi( faa'iido ÷ bilawga bangiga) iyosaami ROI. Had iyo jeer calaamadee hooseeyaha aad ula jeedo.

Marka la isticmaalayo ROI

ROI oo ku jira jawaabaha saamiga: “ pound kasta oo aan halis galo, imisa ayaa soo noqday?” Way ku fiican tahay isbarbardhigga xeeladaha leh qaababka saamiga la midka ah.

Marka la isticmaalo wax-soo-saarka

Wax-soo-saarka is-beddelku wuxuu ku badan yahay warbixinta warshadaha iyo xisaab-xidhka talo-bixinta. Waxay xooga saaraysaa hufnaanta halbeeg kasta oo lagu shubo iyada oo aan loo eegin xajmiga bangiga.

Heerka shaqo joojinta kuma filna

60% heerka shaqo joojinta celceliska 1.50 ayaa luminaya lacag. Ku lammaan ROI/wax-soo-saarka leh celceliska fursadaha iyo CLV si aad u aragto haddii cidhifku dhab yahay ama kala duwan yahay.

qaadasho wax ku ool ah

Soo qaado hal mitir oo aasaasi ah oo ku adkeyso sanadba sanadka ka dambeeya. mybetrecord waxay soo sheegtaa faa'iidada iyo wax-soo-saarka khamaarka la go'aamiyay si aad ula jaanqaadi karto halbeegga uu isticmaalo qorshahaaga wax-soo-saarka.

what-is-a-betting-ledger.title: Waa maxay Ledger-ka sharadka?
what-is-a-betting-ledger.description: Buug-gacmeedka sharadku waa diiwaan habaysan oo lacag kasta oo aad dhigto. Baro sababta khayaamayaal edeb leh ay u haystaan ​​mid iyo waxa la raacayo.
what-is-a-betting-ledger.body:
ALedger-ka sharadkasi fudud waa diiwaan dhammaystiran oo taariikhaysan oo ku saabsan hawl-wadeennadaada: waxa aad taageertay, waxa u qalma, intee, iyo sida ay u degtay. Ka fikir inay tahay farqiga u dhexeeya qiyaasida inaad ku jirto xilli ciyaareedka iyo ogaanshaha.

Waa maxay sababta xaashiyaha u fashilmaan

Inta badan sharadka waxay ku bilaabmaan Excel ama Google Sheets. Taasi waxay shaqaynaysaa ilaa:

  • Qaabacooyinka jebiya marka aad ku darto dhinac kasta ama aad beddesho tiirarka komishanka
  • Waxaad ilowdaa inaad gasho meel banaan ama lacag caddaan ah
  • Ma jeexjeexi kartid tabaha ama ciyaaraha adiga oo aan dib u dhisin miisaska pivot

Ledgeer go'an waxa uu caadi ka dhigaa jaanisyada, waxa uu xisaabiyaa faa'iidada wax ka beddel kasta, oo uu warbixinnada si joogto ah u ilaaliyo.

Maxaa la duubayaa

Ugu yaraan, gal:

  1. Dhacdada iyo xulashada — tafaasiil ku filan si loo aqoonsado sharad bilo ka dib
  2. Saami iyo lacag
  3. Khilaaf( qaab kasta oo buuggu u muujiyo)
    4. Natiijooyinka — sugaya, guul, guuldarro, madhan
  4. faa'iido la dajiyay - ama ha software-ka ka soo saaro xeerarka natiijada

Goobaha horumarsan ee kala sooca raad-raacayaasha fiiqan iyo kuwa wax-u-qorayaasha caadiga ah:

  • Qiimahaaga gaarka ah (qiimahaaga cadaalad ah)
  • Xidhmada xidhitaanka (CLV)
  • Tipster ama isha model
  • Buug-sameeyaha iyo komishanka

Ledger vs joornaalka

Dadku waxay isticmaalaan “jariiradda sharadka” iyo "Ledger sharadka" & rdquo; is beddelka. Si adag, joornaalka waxaa ku jiri kara qoraallo sheeko (& ldquo; degdegay”, & ldquo; line dhaqaaqay”); buug-gacmeedku wuxuu xooga saarayaa tirooyinka. Qalabka ugu wanagsan ayaa labaduba isku daraa: xog habaysan oo lagu daray qoraalo bilaash ah halkii sharadba.

Yaa u baahan mid?

Qof kasta oo u fiirsada sharadka sidii ciyaar xirfadeed halkii uu ka ahaan lahaa tigidhada bakhtiyaanasiibka:

  • Qiyaastayaal isku mid ah oo daba-galka u qalmidda iyo sharadyada bilaashka ah
  • Ganacsatada sariflayaasha oo cabbiraya wax-soo-saarka komishanku-habboon
  • Taageerayaasha Tipster ee xaqiijinaya ROI la xayeysiiyay
  • Cuqaal madadaalada oo raba maaraynta bangiyada daacadda ah

Bilawga

Soo qaado hal ciyaar ama nooc suuqa oo gal 20ka sharad ee soo socda adoon bedelin nidaamkaaga. Dib u eeg heerka shaqo joojinta, celceliska nasiibka, iyo faa'iidada usbuuca. Saldhiggaas ayaa ka qiimo badan tilmaan kasta.

Raad raac kan mybetrecord: samee akoon bilaasha, deji bangigaaga iyo qaabka qallafsanaanta, oo gal sharadkaaga ugu horreeya hal daqiiqo gudaheed.
